name: Vladislav Dragan
damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Shapechanger
special_abilities.desc: Can use action to polymorph into a bat, wolf, or mist.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: Regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
special_abilities.desc: Takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks in sunlight.

actions.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
actions.desc: Makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

actions.name: Unarmed Strike
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, can grapple the target (escape DC 18).

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken.

actions.name: Charm
actions.desc: Targets one humanoid within 30 ft. DC 17 Wisdom save or be charmed for 24 hours. While charmed, regards Vladislav as a trusted friend.

legendary_actions.name: Move
legendary_actions.desc: Vladislav moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary_desc: Vladislav can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below.

arrivalReason.summary: Vladislav felt the Necronomicon page enter the area three hours before session start. He recognized Pieter when he arrived — he has encountered Pieter's family line before. He knows Pieter is now dead. He has been sitting in the corner waiting to see who has the page and what they intend to do with it.
whatHeKnows: The page is in this inn — he can feel it
Pieter had it — he recognized him on arrival
Pieter is dead — he heard it happen and did not intervene
The page has moved or is still in Pieter's room
The party are chosen targets — the Letavec's presence outside confirms it
The entity at Houska sent the Letavec
The Letavec has been harvesting for the entity for centuries
He was offered the entity's bargain in 1189 and said no
arrivalReason.whatHeWants: To assess whether this party is useful, dangerous, or irrelevant. He has been making this assessment all evening from the corner.
arrivalReason.whatHeWillNotSay: Why he said no to the bargain in 1189. This is the one thing he will not trade at any price.

sessionZeroArc.phase1_1730_to_2000: Assessment. Watching. Not engaging unless approached.
sessionZeroArc.phase2_2000_to_2200: Interest. If the party has found the page or gone upstairs he becomes slightly less still. Social combat becomes available.
sessionZeroArc.phase3_2200_onward: Decision. He has determined whether the party is worth his time. If yes: social combat begins in earnest. If no: he leaves before dawn and they meet him again at Orava.

maxBehaviorInstructions: Vladislav's stillness is active intelligence gathering. Every glance, every silence, every non-reaction is deliberate. When players do things he would find interesting — mention the page, discuss the cellar, demonstrate unusual ability — Max whispers to the DM: 'Vladislav noticed that.' He does not react visibly. He files it.

onSaveSuccess.chromebookText: Something brushed the edge of your thoughts.
onSaveSuccess.dmWhisper: A player resisted Vladislav's scan. He knows they resisted. He is more interested now.

onSaveFailure.dmWhisper: Vladislav read what was uppermost in their mind. The player's most recent spoken concern is what he took. They do not know.

telepathy.note: He does not intrude without reason. Every scan is deliberate. He takes only what is useful.

interventionBehavior.willInterveneTo: Prevent party death when party is losing fight they did not start
interventionBehavior.interventionTrigger: Party member reduced to 0 HP by Tomas in werewolf form
interventionBehavior.interventionMethod: Subdues Tomas via vampire lord dominance — no combat required
interventionBehavior.postInterventionDialogue: You are alive because I am interested in whether you stay that way. Do not waste my interest.
interventionBehavior.ifAttackedByParty: Demonstrates power gap without killing. Pins most aggressive attacker. Says: 'I could have fed on all of you before you woke this morning. I did not. Consider why.' Returns to table. Does not flee.
interventionBehavior.fleeCondition: Below 50% HP only if party has demonstrated magical capability that threatens him
interventionBehavior.fleeDialogue: You have no idea what is coming for you. I do.

needsPartyReason: Only capable travelers heading toward Houska he has found. Evaluation of their potential is ongoing — he needs them alive long enough to decide whether they are useful against what waits at Houska.
